description:
I built 12 Claude Code skills that replace your ad agency - a free AI ad audit tool with 190 PPC checks across 6 platforms.

6 Claude Code agents run your paid advertising audit in parallel. Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft - all at once. You get an Ads Health Score, a PDF report with charts you can send to clients, strategic ad planning with 11 industry templates, and budget-aware recommendations. It told me LinkedIn was too expensive at $1K/month and went Meta-only instead. Honest, no fluff.

No subscriptions. No dashboards. No agency retainer. One install command. Let me show you how it works.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 — What is Claude Ads? (190 Checks Overview)
00:22 — One-Command Install
00:30 — Live Demo: /ads plan for a SaaS
01:04 — Agent Questions: Business Type, Budget, Goals
02:43 — Agent Scrapes Website & Analyzes Competitors
04:17 — Ad Strategy, Campaign Architecture & Budget Plan
05:27 — Results: Meta-Only Strategy at $1K/month
06:50 — Generating a PDF Report with Charts
07:27 — PDF Walkthrough: Competitor Landscape & Metrics
09:40 — Extensibility: YouTube, Google, MCP Servers
10:55 — Research: 2,500+ Sources Behind the Skill
11:15 — How to Install & Final Thoughts

🛠️ INSTALL CLAUDE ADS:
► GitHub: https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-ads

💻 INSTALL CLAUDE CODE + VS CODE:
► Claude Code Docs: https://code.claude.com/docs
► VS Code Download: https://code.visualstudio.com/

🔗 RELATED PROJECT:
► Claude SEO (companion skill): https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-seo

🎯 JOIN THE COMMUNITY:
► AI Marketing Hub (2,000+ members, free): https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub
► AI Marketing Hub Pro (theory to action, paid): https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro

🌐 WEBSITE USED IN DEMO:
► Rankenstein Pro: https://rankenstein.pro - AI SEO content engine

👨‍💻 ABOUT ME:
I'm Daniel, host of AI Marketing Hub. I help 2,000+ members learn AI tools for marketing and automation. I build open-source tools because everyone deserves access to the good stuff.

🌐 Website: https://agricidaniel.com
📺 Subscribe: https://youtube.com/@AgriciDaniel

This video covers: Claude Code skills, Claude Code agents, Claude Code tutorial, AI marketing tool, free PPC audit tool, Google Ads audit, Meta Ads audit, ad audit tool free, PPC automation, ad budget optimization, creative fatigue detection, campaign architecture planning, open source ad audit, ad agency alternative, marketing automation 2026, strategic ad planning, multi-platform ad analysis, and industry-specific ad templates.

#ClaudeCode #PPCAudit #GoogleAds #MetaAds #AIMarketing #OpenSource #DigitalMarketing #MarketingAutomation #AdAudit

Live Demo: /ads plan for a SaaS
Agent Questions: Business Type, Budget, Goals
Ad Strategy, Campaign Architecture & Budget Plan
Generating a PDF Report with Charts

fulltitle: Claude Code just replaced your ad agency - here's how
